posts.author: julioherrera (Julio Herrera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi to all intelligent community members I’m Julio Herrera, new member in monday.com and in this community. Please resolve my query - How can I customize my sales pipeline in monday.com CRM to track the progress of deals more effectively?

Regards,
Julio Herrera

posts.author: Hennry1234 (hennrysmith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Mention some important point for sales pipeline below:-

  1. Daily follow up
  2. Focus on best leads
  3. Neglect dead leads
  4. Monitor pipeline metrics
  5. Improve pipeline process
  6. update pipeline regularly
  7. create a well planned sales process

posts.author: julioherrera (Julio Herrera)
posts.cookedHtml: Okay, Thanks

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @julioherrera,

The best way to customize your sales pipeline in monday CRM is by creating a board. A dedicated sales pipeline board helps in breaking down comprehensive sales workflow into multiple, manageable processes that everyone in your group can follow easily. Within the board, you can also set up columns displaying different stages of deal management, like ‘lead,’ ‘prospect,’ ‘qualified,’ ‘negotiation,’ and ‘closed’.

However, building a board dedicated to the sales pipeline requires expert assistance. Our dedicated monday.com consultants would love to assist you throughout the board creation process.

Please feel free to reach out us and start your board development process.
